text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I go watch Opera O and Doto in the Takarazuka
Kinen. Ooooh, they're both even more amazing
than ever!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After the race, the two declare their rivalry. A
feeling I can't describe wells up within me—but I
can't tell if the heat comes from this fateful
moment or something... else.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's only one way to find out, though. By
running more races! Stay tuned next episode for
the Japan Dirt Derby!
